name: Federal Golf Club
about: Established in 2023, Federal Golf Club provides an indoor golf experience using Trackman Simulators, combining play with social aspects like watching sports and enjoying the exclusivity of a private club setting. Located in Ann Arbor, MI, the venue is designed for golfers to play with friends in a private, upscale environment. It functions as a members-only private club that emphasizes both serious practice and social gatherings, featuring a full bar and sports viewing options.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman Simulator technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Exclusive private club atmosphere combining golf with social sports viewing
Full bar and kitchen amenities for a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen and dining options available
Full bar service with cocktails and beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with dual camera technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted as the venue has an on-site kitchen and full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes can be played in approximately 1-2 hours depending on the size of your group and simulator availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Federal Golf Club is a private adults-oriented venue focused on serious golf and social gatherings, so it is not specifically designed for children.
